title: Local auditee database
doc_html:
NOTE: §585 eff. if and when a deposit is made into the Louisiana Transparency Fund. See Acts 2023, No. 446.

§585. Local auditee database

            The auditor shall establish a schedule to include fiscal information regarding local auditees on the website. The schedule and the fiscal information requested from local auditees shall be subject to the approval of the Legislative Audit Advisory Council. After approval, local auditees shall furnish the information requested by the auditor in the format specified by the auditor.

            Acts 2023, No. 446, §1, see Act.

NOTE:  §585 eff. if and when a deposit is made into the Louisiana Transparency Fund. See
Acts 2023, No. 446.
§585.  Local auditee database
The  auditor shall establish a schedule to include fiscal information regarding local
auditees on the website.  The schedule and the fiscal information requested from local
auditees shall be subject to the approval of the Legislative Audit Advisory Council.  After
approval, local auditees shall furnish the information requested by the auditor in the format
specified by the auditor.
Acts 2023, No. 446, §1, see Act.
